title: PO decisions audit log
description: Append-only audit log at .scrum/po/decisions.json. Records every Product Owner decision (whether human or autonomous agent). Writes go exclusively through scripts/scrum/append-po-decision.sh (deployed as .scrum/scripts/append-po-decision.sh). Direct edits are blocked by pre-tool-use-scrum-state-guard.sh.

id.description: Auto-assigned sequential id. dec-NNNN with 4-digit zero-padded counter.

kind.description: What category of decision this is. Used by SM/dashboard to filter audit trails.

request.description: Summary of what SM (or other requester) asked the PO to decide.

decision.description: The decision itself, in free-form text (e.g. 'go', 'no-go', 'split into pbi-007 / pbi-008').

rationale.description: Why this decision was made. Required even for autonomous PO so post-hoc review is possible.

evidence.description: Paths to files / artifacts that ground the decision (test reports, demo logs, design docs). Required (non-empty) for demo_acceptance / uat_item / release_decision kinds — enforced by the wrapper.

assumption.description: True iff the decision was made under best-effort with unverified assumptions (clarification budget exhausted etc.). Used to flag risky decisions for human review.
